axeViolations.help: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has children which are not allowed: a[tabindex]
  Element uses aria-busy="true" while showing a loader

axeViolations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.28 (foreground color: #928a89, background color: #fcfcfa, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.99 (foreground color: #928a89, background color: #f3f1ef, font size: 8.3pt (11px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.28 (foreground color: #928a89, background color: #fcfcfa, font size: 8.3pt (11px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
